declarations.signature: theorem tendsto_nat_div_frequency (a : ℕ) (ha : 0 < a) : Tendsto (fun N : ℕ => ((N / a : ℕ) : ℝ) / (N : ℝ)) atTop (nhds ((1 : ℝ) / (a : ℝ)))

declarations.name: tendsto_divisorFrequency
declarations.signature: theorem tendsto_divisorFrequency (A : Set ℕ) (a : ℕ) : Tendsto (fun N : ℕ => divisorFrequency A N a) atTop (nhds (reciprocalSupportTerm A a))

declarations.name: norm_divisorFrequency_le_reciprocalSupportTerm
declarations.signature: theorem norm_divisorFrequency_le_reciprocalSupportTerm (A : Set ℕ) (N a : ℕ) : ‖divisorFrequency A N a‖ ≤ reciprocalSupportTerm A a

declarations.name: tsum_divisorFrequency_eq_supportCoeff_mean
declarations.signature: theorem tsum_divisorFrequency_eq_supportCoeff_mean (A : Set ℕ) (N : ℕ) : ∑' a : ℕ, divisorFrequency A N a = ((∑ n ∈ Finset.range N, supportCoeff A (n + 1) : ℕ) : ℝ) / (N : ℝ)
declarations.docstring: The frequency tsum is exactly the Cesàro mean of `supportCoeff`.

declarations.name: tendsto_supportCoeff_mean_reciprocalMass
declarations.signature: theorem tendsto_supportCoeff_mean_reciprocalMass (A : Set ℕ) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) : Tendsto (fun N : ℕ => ((∑ n ∈ Finset.range N, supportCoeff A (n + 1) : ℕ) : ℝ) / (N : ℝ)) atTop (nhds (reciprocalMass A))
declarations.docstring: **Analytic core.** For a support with summable reciprocals, the Cesàro mean of its divisor-count coefficient tends exactly to `ρ(A)`.

declarations.name: le_reciprocalMass_of_eventually_le_supportCoeff_mean
declarations.signature: theorem le_reciprocalMass_of_eventually_le_supportCoeff_mean (A : Set ℕ) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) (r : ℝ) (hr : ∀ᶠ N : ℕ in atTop, r ≤ ((∑ n ∈ Finset.range N, supportCoeff A (n + 1) : ℕ) : ℝ) / (N : ℝ)) : r ≤ reciprocalMass A
declarations.docstring: A ready-to-use lower-bound corollary: any eventual lower bound on the support-coefficient Cesàro means is inherited by reciprocal mass.

declarations.name: cesaroMean
declarations.signature: noncomputable def cesaroMean (x : ℕ → ℝ) (N : ℕ) : ℝ
declarations.docstring: Cesàro mean of a real sequence over indices `0,...,N-1`.

declarations.name: tendsto_cesaroMean_shift
declarations.signature: theorem tendsto_cesaroMean_shift (x : ℕ → ℝ) (limit : ℝ) (c : ℕ) (hlimit : Tendsto (cesaroMean x) atTop (nhds limit)) : Tendsto (cesaroMean (fun n : ℕ => x (c + n))) atTop (nhds limit)
declarations.docstring: Removing or adding a fixed finite prefix does not change a Cesàro limit.

declarations.name: sum_supportCoeff_cast_eq_sum_binaryCoeffTail_add_boundary
declarations.signature: theorem sum_supportCoeff_cast_eq_sum_binaryCoeffTail_add_boundary (A : Set ℕ) (N : ℕ) : ((∑ n ∈ Finset.range N, supportCoeff A (n + 1) : ℕ) : ℝ) = (∑ n ∈ Finset.range N, binaryCoeffTail (supportCoeff A) n) + binaryCoeffTail (supportCoeff A) 0 - binaryCoeffTail (supportCoeff A) N
declarations.docstring: Finite telescoping of the binary-tail recurrence.

declarations.name: tendsto_sqrt_nat_div_nat_zero
declarations.signature: theorem tendsto_sqrt_nat_div_nat_zero : Tendsto (fun N : ℕ => Real.sqrt (N : ℝ) / (N : ℝ)) atTop (nhds 0)

declarations.name: tendsto_binaryCoeffTail_supportCoeff_div_nat_zero
declarations.signature: theorem tendsto_binaryCoeffTail_supportCoeff_div_nat_zero (A : Set ℕ) : Tendsto (fun N : ℕ => binaryCoeffTail (supportCoeff A) N / (N : ℝ)) atTop (nhds 0)

declarations.name: tendsto_binaryCoeffTail_supportCoeff_mean_reciprocalMass
declarations.signature: theorem tendsto_binaryCoeffTail_supportCoeff_mean_reciprocalMass (A : Set ℕ) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) : Tendsto (cesaroMean (binaryCoeffTail (supportCoeff A))) atTop (nhds (reciprocalMass A))
declarations.docstring: The Cesàro mean of scaled binary support tails has the same limit as the coefficient mean, namely reciprocal mass. This is the direct order-wrap interface because a rational carry decomposes each tail into a periodic residue fraction plus a nonnegative integral excess.

declarations.name: le_reciprocalMass_of_eventually_le_binaryCoeffTail_mean
declarations.signature: theorem le_reciprocalMass_of_eventually_le_binaryCoeffTail_mean (A : Set ℕ) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) (r : ℝ) (hr : ∀ᶠ N : ℕ in atTop, r ≤ cesaroMean (binaryCoeffTail (supportCoeff A)) N) : r ≤ reciprocalMass A

declarations.name: sum_range_mul_eq_sum_blocks
declarations.signature: theorem sum_range_mul_eq_sum_blocks (x : ℕ → ℝ) (M h : ℕ) : ∑ n ∈ Finset.range (M * h), x n = ∑ q ∈ Finset.range M, ∑ j ∈ Finset.range h, x (q * h + j)
declarations.docstring: Exact partition of a prefix of length `M*h` into `M` consecutive blocks of length `h`.

declarations.name: div_le_of_tendsto_cesaroMean_of_block_lower_bound
declarations.signature: theorem div_le_of_tendsto_cesaroMean_of_block_lower_bound (x : ℕ → ℝ) (limit : ℝ) (h w : ℕ) (hh : 0 < h) (hlimit : Tendsto (cesaroMean x) atTop (nhds limit)) (hblock : ∀ q : ℕ, (w : ℝ) ≤ ∑ j ∈ Finset.range h, x (q * h + j)) : (w : ℝ) / (h : ℝ) ≤ limit
declarations.docstring: A uniform lower bound `w` on every length-`h` block forces the Cesàro limit to be at least `w/h`.

declarations.name: wrapRatio_le_reciprocalMass_of_binaryCoeffTail_blocks
declarations.signature: theorem wrapRatio_le_reciprocalMass_of_binaryCoeffTail_blocks (A : Set ℕ) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) (h w : ℕ) (hh : 0 < h) (hblock : ∀ q : ℕ, (w : ℝ) ≤ ∑ j ∈ Finset.range h, binaryCoeffTail (supportCoeff A) (q * h + j)) : (w : ℝ) / (h : ℝ) ≤ reciprocalMass A
declarations.docstring: Direct order-wrap handoff: a length-`h` block lower bound `w` on genuine support tails yields `ρ(A) ≥ w/h`.

declarations.name: blockRemainder
declarations.signature: noncomputable def blockRemainder (x : ℕ → ℝ) (h N : ℕ) : ℝ
declarations.docstring: The incomplete final block after the `N / h` complete aligned blocks.

declarations.name: sum_range_eq_mul_blockSum_add_blockRemainder
declarations.signature: theorem sum_range_eq_mul_blockSum_add_blockRemainder (x : ℕ → ℝ) (h : ℕ) (blockSum : ℝ) (hblock : ∀ q : ℕ, ∑ j ∈ Finset.range h, x (q * h + j) = blockSum) (N : ℕ) : ∑ n ∈ Finset.range N, x n = ((N / h : ℕ) : ℝ) * blockSum + blockRemainder x h N

declarations.name: blockRemainder_nonneg
declarations.signature: theorem blockRemainder_nonneg (x : ℕ → ℝ) (hx0 : ∀ n : ℕ, 0 ≤ x n) (h N : ℕ) : 0 ≤ blockRemainder x h N

declarations.name: blockRemainder_le_period
declarations.signature: theorem blockRemainder_le_period (x : ℕ → ℝ) (hx1 : ∀ n : ℕ, x n ≤ 1) {h : ℕ} (hh : 0 < h) (N : ℕ) : blockRemainder x h N ≤ (h : ℝ)

declarations.name: tendsto_cesaroMean_of_constant_blocks
declarations.signature: theorem tendsto_cesaroMean_of_constant_blocks (x : ℕ → ℝ) (h : ℕ) (blockSum : ℝ) (hh : 0 < h) (hx0 : ∀ n : ℕ, 0 ≤ x n) (hx1 : ∀ n : ℕ, x n ≤ 1) (hblock : ∀ q : ℕ, ∑ j ∈ Finset.range h, x (q * h + j) = blockSum) : Tendsto (cesaroMean x) atTop (nhds (blockSum / (h : ℝ)))
declarations.docstring: A nonnegative sequence bounded by one and having the same exact sum on every aligned length-`h` block has Cesàro mean `blockSum / h`.

declarations.name: tendsto_cesaroMean_excess_of_binaryCoeffTail_decomposition
declarations.signature: theorem tendsto_cesaroMean_excess_of_binaryCoeffTail_decomposition (A : Set ℕ) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) (residue excess : ℕ → ℝ) (residueMean : ℝ) (hdecomp : ∀ N : ℕ, binaryCoeffTail (supportCoeff A) N = residue N + excess N) (hresidue : Tendsto (cesaroMean residue) atTop (nhds residueMean)) : Tendsto (cesaroMean excess) atTop (nhds (reciprocalMass A - residueMean))
declarations.docstring: If each tail is a periodic residue contribution plus an excess, the excess Cesàro mean converges automatically to `ρ(A) - residueMean`.

declarations.name: residueMean_le_reciprocalMass_of_binaryCoeffTail_decomposition
declarations.signature: theorem residueMean_le_reciprocalMass_of_binaryCoeffTail_decomposition (A : Set ℕ) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) (residue excess : ℕ → ℝ) (residueMean : ℝ) (hdecomp : ∀ N : ℕ, binaryCoeffTail (supportCoeff A) N = residue N + excess N) (hexcess : ∀ N : ℕ, 0 ≤ excess N) (hresidue : Tendsto (cesaroMean residue) atTop (nhds residueMean)) : residueMean ≤ reciprocalMass A
declarations.docstring: Direct wrap lower bound: a nonnegative tail excess over a residue word of Cesàro mean `r` forces `ρ(A) ≥ r`.

declarations.name: reciprocalMass_eq_residueMean_add_excessMean
declarations.signature: theorem reciprocalMass_eq_residueMean_add_excessMean (A : Set ℕ) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) (residue excess : ℕ → ℝ) (residueMean excessMean : ℝ) (hdecomp : ∀ N : ℕ, binaryCoeffTail (supportCoeff A) N = residue N + excess N) (hresidue : Tendsto (cesaroMean residue) atTop (nhds residueMean)) (hexcess : Tendsto (cesaroMean excess) atTop (nhds excessMean)) : reciprocalMass A = residueMean + excessMean
declarations.docstring: Exact `ρ = residueMean + lim-mean(excess)` identity when the excess mean is named explicitly.

declarations.name: doublingResidue_mul_period
declarations.signature: theorem doublingResidue_mul_period (p : ℕ) {v h : ℕ} (hperiod : IsDoublingPeriod v h) (q n : ℕ) : doublingResidue (p * 2 ^ (q * h)) v n = doublingResidue p v n

declarations.name: doublingWrapCount_mul_period
declarations.signature: theorem doublingWrapCount_mul_period (p : ℕ) {v h : ℕ} (hperiod : IsDoublingPeriod v h) (q : ℕ) : doublingWrapCount (p * 2 ^ (q * h)) v h = doublingWrapCount p v h

declarations.name: tendsto_cesaroMean_normalizedDoublingResidue
declarations.signature: theorem tendsto_cesaroMean_normalizedDoublingResidue (p : ℕ) {v h : ℕ} (hv : 0 < v) (hperiod : IsDoublingPeriod v h) : Tendsto (cesaroMean (fun N : ℕ => (doublingResidue p v N : ℝ) / (v : ℝ))) atTop (nhds ((doublingWrapCount p v h : ℝ) / (h : ℝ)))

declarations.name: tendsto_shiftedOddTailExcess_mean
declarations.signature: theorem tendsto_shiftedOddTailExcess_mean (A : Set ℕ) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) (p c : ℕ) {v h : ℕ} (hv : 0 < v) (hperiod : IsDoublingPeriod v h) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hstate : IsShiftedOddSupportTailState A p v c u) : Tendsto (cesaroMean (fun N : ℕ => (oddTailExcess u v N : ℝ))) atTop (nhds (reciprocalMass A - (doublingWrapCount p v h : ℝ) / (h : ℝ)))
declarations.docstring: The shifted odd-tail excess has limit `ρ(A) - w/h`.

declarations.name: tendsto_oddTailExcess_mean
declarations.signature: theorem tendsto_oddTailExcess_mean (A : Set ℕ) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) (p : ℕ) {v h : ℕ} (hv : 0 < v) (hperiod : IsDoublingPeriod v h) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hstate : IsOddSupportTailState A p v u) : Tendsto (cesaroMean (fun N : ℕ => (oddTailExcess u v N : ℝ))) atTop (nhds (reciprocalMass A - (doublingWrapCount p v h : ℝ) / (h : ℝ)))
declarations.docstring: The exact mean-excess statement in its strongest canonical form: the mean excess exists automatically and its limit is `ρ(A) - w/h`.

declarations.name: reciprocalMass_eq_wrapRatio_add_oddTailExcessMean
declarations.signature: theorem reciprocalMass_eq_wrapRatio_add_oddTailExcessMean (A : Set ℕ) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) (p : ℕ) {v h : ℕ} (hv : 0 < v) (hperiod : IsDoublingPeriod v h) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hstate : IsOddSupportTailState A p v u) (excessMean : ℝ) (hexcess : Tendsto (cesaroMean (fun N : ℕ => (oddTailExcess u v N : ℝ))) atTop (nhds excessMean)) : reciprocalMass A = (doublingWrapCount p v h : ℝ) / (h : ℝ) + excessMean
declarations.docstring: Explicit named-limit form of `ρ = w/h + lim mean(excess)`.

declarations.name: doublingWrapRatio_le_reciprocalMass
declarations.signature: theorem doublingWrapRatio_le_reciprocalMass (A : Set ℕ) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) (p : ℕ) {v h : ℕ} (hv : 0 < v) (hperiod : IsDoublingPeriod v h) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hstate : IsOddSupportTailState A p v u) : (doublingWrapCount p v h : ℝ) / (h : ℝ) ≤ reciprocalMass A
declarations.docstring: Fully instantiated wrap lower bound for a genuine odd support-tail state.

declarations.name: doublingWrapRatio_reciprocalMassDivergesOrAtLeast
declarations.signature: theorem doublingWrapRatio_reciprocalMassDivergesOrAtLeast (A : Set ℕ) (p : ℕ) {v h : ℕ} (hv : 0 < v) (hperiod : IsDoublingPeriod v h) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hstate : IsOddSupportTailState A p v u) : ReciprocalMassDivergesOrAtLeast A ((doublingWrapCount p v h : ℝ) / (h : ℝ))

declarations.name: one_div_period_reciprocalMassDivergesOrAtLeast
declarations.signature: theorem one_div_period_reciprocalMassDivergesOrAtLeast (A : Set ℕ) (p : ℕ) {v h : ℕ} (hv : 1 < v) (hvodd : Odd v) (hpv : p.Coprime v) (hperiod : IsDoublingPeriod v h) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hstate : IsOddSupportTailState A p v u) : ReciprocalMassDivergesOrAtLeast A ((1 : ℝ) / (h : ℝ))
declarations.docstring: The positive-wrap corollary `1/h ≤ ρ(A)`, with divergence handled honestly rather than relying on the nonsummable convention for `tsum`.

declarations.name: tendsto_shifted_binaryCoeffTail_supportCoeff_mean_reciprocalMass
declarations.signature: theorem tendsto_shifted_binaryCoeffTail_supportCoeff_mean_reciprocalMass (A : Set ℕ) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) (c : ℕ) : Tendsto (cesaroMean (fun N : ℕ => binaryCoeffTail (supportCoeff A) (c + N))) atTop (nhds (reciprocalMass A))
declarations.docstring: The positive-wrap corollary `1/h ≤ ρ(A)`, with divergence handled honestly rather than relying on the nonsummable convention for `tsum`. -/ theorem one_div_period_reciprocalMassDivergesOrAtLeast (A : Set ℕ) (p : ℕ) {v h : ℕ} (hv : 1 < v) (hvodd : Odd v) (hpv : p.Coprime v) (hperiod : IsDoublingPeriod v h) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hstate : IsOddSupportTailState A p v u) : ReciprocalMassDivergesOrAtLeast A ((1 : ℝ) / (h : ℝ)) := by rcases doublingWrapRatio_reciprocalMassDivergesOrAtLeast A p (by omega) hperiod u hstate with hdiv | hbound · exact Or.inl hdiv · have hone : (1 : ℝ) / (h : ℝ) ≤ (doublingWrapCount p v h : ℝ) / (h : ℝ) := by apply (div_le_div_iff_of_pos_right (by exact_mod_cast hperiod.1 : (0 : ℝ) < (h : ℝ))).2 exact_mod_cast (doublingWrapCount_pos p hv hvodd hpv hperiod) exact Or.inr (hone.trans hbound) /-! ## Fraction-facing global order-wrap theorem

declarations.name: support_fraction_oddOrder_wrapRatio_le_reciprocalMass
declarations.signature: theorem support_fraction_oddOrder_wrapRatio_le_reciprocalMass (A : Set ℕ) (hA : ∃ a : ℕ, 0 < a ∧ a ∈ A) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) (p : ℤ) (c : ℕ) {v : ℕ} (hv : 1 < v) (hvodd : Odd v) (hvalue : erdosSupportSeries 2 A = (p : ℝ) / ((2 ^ c * v : ℕ) : ℝ)) : (doublingWrapCount p.toNat v (oddDoublingOrder v hvodd) : ℝ) / (oddDoublingOrder v hvodd : ℝ) ≤ reciprocalMass A

declarations.name: one_div_oddOrder_le_reciprocalMass_of_support_fraction
declarations.signature: theorem one_div_oddOrder_le_reciprocalMass_of_support_fraction (A : Set ℕ) (hA : ∃ a : ℕ, 0 < a ∧ a ∈ A) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) (p : ℤ) (c : ℕ) {v : ℕ} (hv : 1 < v) (hvodd : Odd v) (hpv : p.toNat.Coprime v) (hvalue : erdosSupportSeries 2 A = (p : ℝ) / ((2 ^ c * v : ℕ) : ℝ)) : (1 : ℝ) / (oddDoublingOrder v hvodd : ℝ) ≤ reciprocalMass A

declarations.name: support_fraction_oddOrder_wrapRatio_reciprocalMassDivergesOrAtLeast
declarations.signature: theorem support_fraction_oddOrder_wrapRatio_reciprocalMassDivergesOrAtLeast (A : Set ℕ) (hA : ∃ a : ℕ, 0 < a ∧ a ∈ A) (p : ℤ) (c : ℕ) {v : ℕ} (hv : 1 < v) (hvodd : Odd v) (hvalue : erdosSupportSeries 2 A = (p : ℝ) / ((2 ^ c * v : ℕ) : ℝ)) : ReciprocalMassDivergesOrAtLeast A ((doublingWrapCount p.toNat v (oddDoublingOrder v hvodd) : ℝ) / (oddDoublingOrder v hvodd : ℝ))
declarations.docstring: Full finite-or-divergent formulation of the fraction-facing order-wrap bound.

declarations.name: support_fraction_one_div_oddOrder_reciprocalMassDivergesOrAtLeast
declarations.signature: theorem support_fraction_one_div_oddOrder_reciprocalMassDivergesOrAtLeast (A : Set ℕ) (hA : ∃ a : ℕ, 0 < a ∧ a ∈ A) (p : ℤ) (c : ℕ) {v : ℕ} (hv : 1 < v) (hvodd : Odd v) (hpv : p.toNat.Coprime v) (hvalue : erdosSupportSeries 2 A = (p : ℝ) / ((2 ^ c * v : ℕ) : ℝ)) : ReciprocalMassDivergesOrAtLeast A ((1 : ℝ) / (oddDoublingOrder v hvodd : ℝ))
declarations.docstring: For a reduced numerator modulo the odd part, rationality forces the `1/ord_v(2)` reciprocal-mass lower bound.

declarations.name: tendsto_shifted_tail_excess_mean
declarations.signature: theorem tendsto_shifted_tail_excess_mean (A : Set ℕ) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) (c p : ℕ) {v h : ℕ} (hv : 0 < v) (hperiod : IsDoublingPeriod v h) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (htail : ∀ N : ℕ, (u N : ℝ) = (v : ℝ) * binaryCoeffTail (supportCoeff A) (c + N)) (hmod : ∀ N : ℕ, u N ≡ p * 2 ^ N [MOD v]) : Tendsto (cesaroMean (fun N : ℕ => ((u N / v : ℕ) : ℝ))) atTop (nhds (reciprocalMass A - (doublingWrapCount p v h : ℝ) / (h : ℝ)))
declarations.docstring: For a reduced numerator modulo the odd part, rationality forces the `1/ord_v(2)` reciprocal-mass lower bound. -/ theorem support_fraction_one_div_oddOrder_reciprocalMassDivergesOrAtLeast (A : Set ℕ) (hA : ∃ a : ℕ, 0 < a ∧ a ∈ A) (p : ℤ) (c : ℕ) {v : ℕ} (hv : 1 < v) (hvodd : Odd v) (hpv : p.toNat.Coprime v) (hvalue : erdosSupportSeries 2 A = (p : ℝ) / ((2 ^ c * v : ℕ) : ℝ)) : ReciprocalMassDivergesOrAtLeast A ((1 : ℝ) / (oddDoublingOrder v hvodd : ℝ)) := by by_cases hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A) · exact Or.inr (one_div_oddOrder_le_reciprocalMass_of_support_fraction A hA hsum p c hv hvodd hpv hvalue) · exact Or.inl hsum /-! ## Shifted exact excess-mean identity

declarations.name: exists_shifted_oddTailExcess_mean_of_support_fraction
declarations.signature: theorem exists_shifted_oddTailExcess_mean_of_support_fraction (A : Set ℕ) (hA : ∃ a : ℕ, 0 < a ∧ a ∈ A) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) (p : ℤ) (c : ℕ) {v h : ℕ} (hv : 0 < v) (hvalue : erdosSupportSeries 2 A = (p : ℝ) / ((2 ^ c * v : ℕ) : ℝ)) (hperiod : IsDoublingPeriod v h) : ∃ u : ℕ → ℕ, (∀ n : ℕ, (u n : ℝ) = (v : ℝ) * binaryCoeffTail (supportCoeff A) (c + n)) ∧ (∀ n : ℕ, 0 < u n) ∧ (∀ n : ℕ, u (n + 1) + v * supportCoeff A (c + n + 1) = 2 * u n) ∧ (∀ n : ℕ, u n ≡ p.toNat * 2 ^ n [MOD v]) ∧

declarations.name: booleanCollisionSurplus
declarations.docstring: The natural-number realization of `ceil ((m - 1) / 2)` for positive cardinalities. For `m > 0`, this is exactly `m / 2`.

declarations.name: card_le_supportCoeff_of_forced_divisors
declarations.signature: theorem card_le_supportCoeff_of_forced_divisors (A : Set ℕ) (F : Finset ℕ) (n : ℕ) (hn : n ≠ 0) (hFA : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∈ A) (hFdvd : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∣ n) : F.card ≤ supportCoeff A n
declarations.docstring: Every marked support divisor of `n` contributes a distinct unit to `supportCoeff A n`.

declarations.name: booleanCollisionSurplus_le_of_carry
declarations.signature: theorem booleanCollisionSurplus_le_of_carry (m f epsilon kPrev kNext : ℕ) (hmf : m ≤ f) (hepsilon : epsilon ≤ 1) (hcarry : f + kNext = epsilon + 2 * kPrev) : booleanCollisionSurplus m ≤ kPrev
declarations.docstring: Pure carry arithmetic behind the Boolean collision gain.

declarations.name: booleanCollisionSurplus_le_of_supportCoeff_carry
declarations.signature: theorem booleanCollisionSurplus_le_of_supportCoeff_carry (A : Set ℕ) (F : Finset ℕ) (n : ℕ) (hn : n ≠ 0) (hFA : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∈ A) (hFdvd : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∣ n) (epsilon kPrev kNext : ℕ) (hepsilon : epsilon ≤ 1) (hcarry : supportCoeff A n + kNext = epsilon + 2 * kPrev) : booleanCollisionSurplus F.card ≤ kPrev
declarations.docstring: Support-specialized form of the same carry arithmetic.

declarations.name: shiftedSupportCoeff_add_oddTailExcess_succ_eq_wrap_add_two_excess
declarations.signature: theorem shiftedSupportCoeff_add_oddTailExcess_succ_eq_wrap_add_two_excess (A : Set ℕ) (p c : ℕ) {v : ℕ} (hv : 0 < v) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hstate : IsShiftedOddSupportTailState A p v c u) (N : ℕ) : supportCoeff A (c + N + 1) + oddTailExcess u v (N + 1) = doublingWrapDigit p v N + 2 * oddTailExcess u v N
declarations.docstring: The quotient excess of a genuine shifted odd tail state satisfies the exact Boolean carry equation.

declarations.name: supportCoeff_add_oddTailExcess_succ_eq_wrap_add_two_excess
declarations.signature: theorem supportCoeff_add_oddTailExcess_succ_eq_wrap_add_two_excess (A : Set ℕ) (p : ℕ) {v : ℕ} (hv : 0 < v) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hstate : IsOddSupportTailState A p v u) (N : ℕ) : supportCoeff A (N + 1) + oddTailExcess u v (N + 1) = doublingWrapDigit p v N + 2 * oddTailExcess u v N
declarations.docstring: The quotient excess of a genuine odd tail state satisfies the exact Boolean carry equation.

declarations.name: booleanCollisionSurplus_le_shiftedOddTailExcess
declarations.signature: theorem booleanCollisionSurplus_le_shiftedOddTailExcess (A : Set ℕ) (F : Finset ℕ) (p c : ℕ) {v : ℕ} (hv : 0 < v) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hstate : IsShiftedOddSupportTailState A p v c u) {n : ℕ} (hcn : c < n) (hFA : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∈ A) (hFdvd : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∣ n) : booleanCollisionSurplus F.card ≤ oddTailExcess u v (n - c - 1)
declarations.docstring: At every common multiple of a finite support fragment past the shift, the preceding shifted odd-tail excess carries the collision surplus.

declarations.name: booleanCollisionSurplus_le_oddTailExcess
declarations.signature: theorem booleanCollisionSurplus_le_oddTailExcess (A : Set ℕ) (F : Finset ℕ) (p : ℕ) {v : ℕ} (hv : 0 < v) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hstate : IsOddSupportTailState A p v u) {n : ℕ} (hn : 0 < n) (hFA : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∈ A) (hFdvd : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∣ n) : booleanCollisionSurplus F.card ≤ oddTailExcess u v (n - 1)
declarations.docstring: At every common multiple of a finite support fragment, the preceding odd-tail excess carries the collision surplus.

declarations.name: periodic_spike_div_le_of_tendsto_cesaroMean
declarations.signature: theorem periodic_spike_div_le_of_tendsto_cesaroMean (k : ℕ → ℕ) (limit : ℝ) (L q r : ℕ) (hL : 0 < L) (hr : r < L) (hspike : ∀ j : ℕ, q ≤ k (r + j * L)) (hlimit : Tendsto (cesaroMean (fun n : ℕ => (k n : ℝ))) atTop (nhds limit)) : (q : ℝ) / (L : ℝ) ≤ limit
declarations.docstring: A periodic arithmetic progression of excess spikes contributes at least `q / L` to every Cesàro limit. The residue `r` handles a finite denominator shift.

declarations.name: periodic_spike_div_le_of_tendsto_cesaroMean_offset
declarations.signature: theorem periodic_spike_div_le_of_tendsto_cesaroMean_offset (k : ℕ → ℕ) (limit : ℝ) (L q r : ℕ) (hL : 0 < L) (hspike : ∀ j : ℕ, q ≤ k (r + j * L)) (hlimit : Tendsto (cesaroMean (fun n : ℕ => (k n : ℝ))) atTop (nhds limit)) : (q : ℝ) / (L : ℝ) ≤ limit
declarations.docstring: Offset-free version of the progression-density lemma. A fixed preperiod does not affect the density `1/L`.

declarations.name: common_multiple_sub_shift_index
declarations.signature: private theorem common_multiple_sub_shift_index {c L : ℕ} (hL : 0 < L) (j : ℕ) : (c + 1 + j) * L - c - 1 = ((c + 1) * L - c - 1) + j * L
declarations.docstring: Index bookkeeping for excess spikes at the common multiples `(c + 1 + j) * L`: the preceding shifted index lies in the arithmetic progression with offset `(c + 1) * L - c - 1` and step `L`.

declarations.name: shiftedBooleanCollision_wrap_bound_of_common_multiple
declarations.signature: theorem shiftedBooleanCollision_wrap_bound_of_common_multiple (A : Set ℕ) (F : Finset ℕ) (p c : ℕ) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) {v h L : ℕ} (hv : 0 < v) (hperiod : IsDoublingPeriod v h) (hL : 0 < L) (hFA : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∈ A) (hFL : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∣ L) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hstate : IsShiftedOddSupportTailState A p v c u) : (doublingWrapCount p v h : ℝ) / (h : ℝ) + (booleanCollisionSurplus F.card : ℝ) / (L : ℝ) ≤ reciprocalMass A
declarations.docstring: Full shifted Boolean-collision inequality for a displayed denominator `2^c v`. The hypothesis says `L` is a common multiple of the marked support fragment; taking `L = lcm(F)` gives the sharpest instance.

declarations.name: wrapRatio_add_collisionSurplus_div_le_reciprocalMass
declarations.signature: theorem wrapRatio_add_collisionSurplus_div_le_reciprocalMass (A : Set ℕ) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) (p : ℕ) {v h : ℕ} (hv : 0 < v) (hperiod : IsDoublingPeriod v h) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hstate : IsOddSupportTailState A p v u) (L q r : ℕ) (hL : 0 < L) (hr : r < L) (hspike : ∀ j : ℕ, q ≤ oddTailExcess u v (r + j * L)) : (doublingWrapCount p v h : ℝ) / (h : ℝ) + (q : ℝ) / (L : ℝ) ≤ reciprocalMass A
declarations.docstring: Analytic fan-in for the collision inequality once a carry excess has a spike on one residue class modulo `L`.

declarations.name: booleanCollision_wrap_bound_of_common_multiple
declarations.signature: theorem booleanCollision_wrap_bound_of_common_multiple (A : Set ℕ) (F : Finset ℕ) (p : ℕ) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) {v h L : ℕ} (hv : 0 < v) (hperiod : IsDoublingPeriod v h) (hL : 0 < L) (hFA : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∈ A) (hFL : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∣ L) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hstate : IsOddSupportTailState A p v u) : (doublingWrapCount p v h : ℝ) / (h : ℝ) + (booleanCollisionSurplus F.card : ℝ) / (L : ℝ) ≤ reciprocalMass A
declarations.docstring: Canonical unshifted Boolean-collision theorem. If every element of `F` divides `L`, then collisions at the positive multiples of `L` force the full `ceil ((|F|-1)/2) / L` gain above the residue-wrap mean.

declarations.name: one_lt_of_tendsto_cesaroMean_of_positive_two_spikes
declarations.signature: theorem one_lt_of_tendsto_cesaroMean_of_positive_two_spikes (k : ℕ → ℕ) (limit : ℝ) (L r : ℕ) (hL : 0 < L) (hpos : ∀ n : ℕ, 0 < k n) (hspike : ∀ j : ℕ, 2 ≤ k (r + j * L)) (hlimit : Tendsto (cesaroMean (fun n : ℕ => (k n : ℝ))) atTop (nhds limit)) : 1 < limit
declarations.docstring: A positive integer sequence with a density-`1/L` family of values at least two has Cesàro limit strictly greater than one.

declarations.name: one_lt_reciprocalMass_of_dyadic_support_fraction_of_two_pos_mem
declarations.signature: theorem one_lt_reciprocalMass_of_dyadic_support_fraction_of_two_pos_mem (A : Set ℕ) (hsum : Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A)) (p : ℤ) (c : ℕ) {a b : ℕ} (ha : 0 < a) (hb : 0 < b) (hab : a ≠ b) (haA : a ∈ A) (hbA : b ∈ A) (hvalue : erdosSupportSeries 2 A = (p : ℝ) / ((2 ^ c : ℕ) : ℝ)) : 1 < reciprocalMass A
declarations.docstring: A dyadic support fraction with two distinct positive support elements has reciprocal mass strictly greater than one whenever that mass is summable.

declarations.name: dyadic_support_fraction_reciprocalMass_diverges_or_gt_one
declarations.signature: theorem dyadic_support_fraction_reciprocalMass_diverges_or_gt_one (A : Set ℕ) (hAinf : A.Infinite) (p : ℤ) (c : ℕ) (hvalue : erdosSupportSeries 2 A = (p : ℝ) / ((2 ^ c : ℕ) : ℝ)) : ¬ Summable (reciprocalSupportTerm A) ∨ 1 < reciprocalMass A
declarations.docstring: Dyadic consequence, stated without abusing the real `tsum` convention in the divergent case: an infinite dyadic-rational support has divergent reciprocal mass or finite reciprocal mass strictly greater than one.

declarations.name: one_add_mul_card_le_two_mul_shifted_state
declarations.signature: theorem one_add_mul_card_le_two_mul_shifted_state (A : Set ℕ) (F : Finset ℕ) (c v L : ℕ) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hcL : c < L) (hpos : ∀ n : ℕ, 0 < u n) (hrec : ∀ n : ℕ, u (n + 1) + v * supportCoeff A (c + n + 1) = 2 * u n) (hFA : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∈ A) (hFdvd : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∣ L) : 1 + v * F.card ≤ 2 * u (L - c - 1)
declarations.docstring: The division-free local carry inequality. A finite marked support fragment contributes at least its cardinality to the coefficient at a common multiple, while positivity of the next carry contributes the extra one. The shifted index is `L - c - 1`, not `L - 1`.

declarations.name: one_add_mul_card_le_two_mul_state
declarations.signature: theorem one_add_mul_card_le_two_mul_state (A : Set ℕ) (F : Finset ℕ) (v L : ℕ) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hL : 0 < L) (hpos : ∀ n : ℕ, 0 < u n) (hrec : ∀ n : ℕ, u (n + 1) + v * supportCoeff A (n + 1) = 2 * u n) (hFA : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∈ A) (hFdvd : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∣ L) : 1 + v * F.card ≤ 2 * u (L - 1)
declarations.docstring: Unshifted wrapper for a recurrence indexed directly by `supportCoeff A (n + 1)`.

declarations.name: one_add_mul_card_ceil_half_le_shifted_state
declarations.signature: theorem one_add_mul_card_ceil_half_le_shifted_state (A : Set ℕ) (F : Finset ℕ) (c v L : ℕ) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hcL : c < L) (hpos : ∀ n : ℕ, 0 < u n) (hrec : ∀ n : ℕ, u (n + 1) + v * supportCoeff A (c + n + 1) = 2 * u n) (hFA : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∈ A) (hFdvd : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∣ L) : (1 + v * F.card + 1) / 2 ≤ u (L - c - 1)
declarations.docstring: Natural ceiling form of the shifted carry inequality.

declarations.name: one_add_mul_card_half_le_shifted_state
declarations.signature: theorem one_add_mul_card_half_le_shifted_state (A : Set ℕ) (F : Finset ℕ) (c v L : ℕ) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hcL : c < L) (hpos : ∀ n : ℕ, 0 < u n) (hrec : ∀ n : ℕ, u (n + 1) + v * supportCoeff A (c + n + 1) = 2 * u n) (hFA : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∈ A) (hFdvd : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∣ L) : ((1 + v * F.card : ℕ) : ℝ) / 2 ≤ (u (L - c - 1) : ℝ)
declarations.docstring: Ordinary real half form of the shifted carry inequality.

declarations.name: exists_shifted_odd_tail_nat_state_with_common_multiple_bound_of_support_fraction
declarations.signature: theorem exists_shifted_odd_tail_nat_state_with_common_multiple_bound_of_support_fraction (A : Set ℕ) (hA : ∃ a : ℕ, 0 < a ∧ a ∈ A) (F : Finset ℕ) (p : ℤ) (c v L : ℕ) (hv : 0 < v) (hcL : c < L) (hFA : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∈ A) (hFdvd : ∀ a ∈ F, a ∣ L) (hvalue : erdosSupportSeries 2 A = (p : ℝ) / ((2 ^ c * v : ℕ) : ℝ)) : ∃ u : ℕ → ℕ, (∀ n : ℕ, (u n : ℝ) = (v : ℝ) * binaryCoeffTail (supportCoeff A) (c + n)) ∧ (∀ n : ℕ, 0 < u n) ∧ (∀ n : ℕ, u (n + 1) + v * supportCoeff A (c + n + 1) = 2 * u n) ∧ (∀ n : ℕ, u n ≡ p.toNat * 2 ^ n [MOD v]) ∧
declarations.docstring: Fraction-facing local wrapper. It preserves every clause of the existing shifted natural-state constructor and adds the raw common-multiple bound without changing that constructor's API.

declarations.name: shifted_state_unbounded_of_infinite_support
declarations.signature: theorem shifted_state_unbounded_of_infinite_support (A : Set ℕ) (hAinf : A.Infinite) (c v : ℕ) (hv : 0 < v) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hpos : ∀ n : ℕ, 0 < u n) (hrec : ∀ n : ℕ, u (n + 1) + v * supportCoeff A (c + n + 1) = 2 * u n) : ∀ B : ℕ, ∃ n : ℕ, B < u n
declarations.docstring: The unboundedness core: every positive shifted recurrence over an infinite support is globally unbounded. The proof selects `2B+1` positive support elements and uses their product, multiplied by `c+1`, as an explicit common multiple.

declarations.name: exists_unbounded_shifted_odd_tail_nat_state_of_support_fraction
declarations.signature: theorem exists_unbounded_shifted_odd_tail_nat_state_of_support_fraction (A : Set ℕ) (hAinf : A.Infinite) (p : ℤ) (c v : ℕ) (hv : 0 < v) (hvalue : erdosSupportSeries 2 A = (p : ℝ) / ((2 ^ c * v : ℕ) : ℝ)) : ∃ u : ℕ → ℕ, (∀ n : ℕ, (u n : ℝ) = (v : ℝ) * binaryCoeffTail (supportCoeff A) (c + n)) ∧ (∀ n : ℕ, 0 < u n) ∧ (∀ n : ℕ, u (n + 1) + v * supportCoeff A (c + n + 1) = 2 * u n) ∧ (∀ n : ℕ, u n ≡ p.toNat * 2 ^ n [MOD v]) ∧ (∀ B : ℕ, ∃ n : ℕ, B < u n)
declarations.docstring: Canonical fraction-facing unboundedness theorem. Every infinite rational support admits the existing shifted natural tail state, and that state is globally unbounded.

declarations.name: carryOrbit23_common_multiple_bound_validation66
declarations.signature: theorem carryOrbit23_common_multiple_bound_validation66 : ∀ k ∈ Finset.range 66, (1 : ℤ) + 21 * ({2, 3} : Finset ℕ).card ≤ 2 * carryOrbit23 (6 * k + 5)
declarations.docstring: Finite regression check on the `{2,3}` support family: every tested common multiple hits the exact preceding carry value `26`, clearing the common-multiple bound. The range `0 ≤ k < 66` corresponds to the 66 checked indices `6(k+1)-1`.

declarations.name: coprimeResidueStarts
declarations.docstring: Reduced numerator starts modulo `v`, represented as a computable list for the native finite certificate.

declarations.name: isPowerOfTwoOrbitStart
declarations.signature: def isPowerOfTwoOrbitStart (p v h : ℕ) : Bool
declarations.docstring: Does the starting residue lie in the displayed power-of-two orbit?

declarations.name: orderWrapValidationRow
declarations.docstring: Computable validation of positivity and both directions of the one-wrap classification on one finite modulus/order row. This is validation evidence, not the source of the universal theorem above.

declarations.name: orderWrapValidationRows
declarations.docstring: The twelve modulus/order rows of the finite validation; together they carry `446` coprime starting residues (`orderWrapValidatedStartCount_eq_446`).

declarations.name: wrapMinimumCertificate
declarations.signature: def wrapMinimumCertificate (v h minimum : ℕ) : Bool
declarations.docstring: Exact minimum-wrap certificate on a single finite row.

declarations.name: orderWrap_minima_table_passes
declarations.signature: theorem orderWrap_minima_table_passes : wrapMinimumCertificate 3 2 1 = true ∧ wrapMinimumCertificate 5 4 2 = true ∧ wrapMinimumCertificate 7 3 1 = true ∧ wrapMinimumCertificate 15 4 1 = true ∧ wrapMinimumCertificate 31 5 1 = true
declarations.docstring: The minimum wrap ratios on these rows are respectively `1/2, 2/4, 1/3, 1/4, 1/5`.

declarations.name: nat_add_one_le_two_pow
declarations.docstring: The elementary exponential bound used for every prime exponent.

declarations.name: nat_add_one_pow_le_self_pow_mul_two_pow
declarations.signature: theorem nat_add_one_pow_le_self_pow_mul_two_pow (k a : ℕ) (hk : 1 ≤ k) : (a + 1) ^ k ≤ k ^ k * 2 ^ a
declarations.docstring: A single explicit penalty `k^k` controls every exponent at every prime at least two.

declarations.name: factorization_add_one_pow_le_penalty_mul
declarations.signature: theorem factorization_add_one_pow_le_penalty_mul (n p k : ℕ) (hk : 1 ≤ k) (hp : p ∈ n.primeFactors) : (n.factorization p + 1) ^ k ≤ (if p < 2 ^ k then k ^ k else 1) * p ^ n.factorization p
declarations.docstring: Pointwise prime-factor estimate: only primes below `2^k` pay the explicit `k^k` penalty.

declarations.name: card_small_primeFactors_le_two_pow
declarations.signature: theorem card_small_primeFactors_le_two_pow (n k : ℕ) : (n.primeFactors.filter fun p => p < 2 ^ k).card ≤ 2 ^ k
declarations.docstring: There are at most `2^k` prime factors below the cutoff `2^k`.

declarations.name: divisorSubpowerConst
declarations.docstring: Completely explicit constant for the fixed-`k` divisor bound.

declarations.name: card_divisors_pow_le_divisorSubpowerConst_pow_mul
declarations.signature: theorem card_divisors_pow_le_divisorSubpowerConst_pow_mul (n k : ℕ) (hn : 0 < n) (hk : 1 ≤ k) : n.divisors.card ^ k ≤ divisorSubpowerConst k ^ k * n
declarations.docstring: Fixed-natural-power divisor theorem. All prime-factor bookkeeping is in `ℕ`; the only loss is the explicit penalty from primes below `2^k`.

declarations.name: card_divisors_le_divisorSubpowerConst_mul_rpow
declarations.signature: theorem card_divisors_le_divisorSubpowerConst_mul_rpow (n k : ℕ) (hk : 1 ≤ k) : (n.divisors.card : ℝ) ≤ (divisorSubpowerConst k : ℝ) * (n : ℝ) ^ ((k : ℝ)⁻¹)
declarations.docstring: Take the real `k`-th root once, after the finite prime-factor product has been closed in `ℕ`. This version includes `n = 0`.

declarations.name: supportCoeff_pow_le_divisorSubpowerConst_pow_mul
declarations.signature: theorem supportCoeff_pow_le_divisorSubpowerConst_pow_mul (A : Set ℕ) (n k : ℕ) (hn : 0 < n) (hk : 1 ≤ k) : supportCoeff A n ^ k ≤ divisorSubpowerConst k ^ k * n
declarations.docstring: The support coefficient inherits the fixed-power divisor theorem.

declarations.name: supportCoeff_le_divisorSubpowerConst_mul_rpow
declarations.signature: theorem supportCoeff_le_divisorSubpowerConst_mul_rpow (A : Set ℕ) (n k : ℕ) (hk : 1 ≤ k) : (supportCoeff A n : ℝ) ≤ (divisorSubpowerConst k : ℝ) * (n : ℝ) ^ ((k : ℝ)⁻¹)
declarations.docstring: Real subpower form inherited by `supportCoeff`.

declarations.name: SupportCoeffZeroWindow
declarations.signature: def SupportCoeffZeroWindow (A : Set ℕ) (N h : ℕ) : Prop
declarations.docstring: `supportCoeff A` vanishes on the `h` positive indices immediately after `N`, namely `N + 1, ..., N + h`.

declarations.name: shiftedTailState_eq_pow_mul_of_supportCoeffZeroWindow
declarations.signature: theorem shiftedTailState_eq_pow_mul_of_supportCoeffZeroWindow (A : Set ℕ) (c v N h : ℕ) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hrec : ∀ n : ℕ, u (n + 1) + v * supportCoeff A (c + n + 1) = 2 * u n) (hzero : SupportCoeffZeroWindow A (c + N) h) : u (N + h) = 2 ^ h * u N
declarations.docstring: A shifted natural tail state doubles exactly across a support-coefficient zero window. This is the recurrence-only core; it uses no analytic growth estimate.

declarations.name: pow_le_shiftedTailState_of_supportCoeffZeroWindow
declarations.signature: theorem pow_le_shiftedTailState_of_supportCoeffZeroWindow (A : Set ℕ) (c v N h : ℕ) (u : ℕ → ℕ) (hpos : ∀ n : ℕ, 0 < u n) (hrec : ∀ n : ℕ, u (n + 1) + v * supportCoeff A (c + n + 1) = 2 * u n) (hzero : SupportCoeffZeroWindow A (c + N) h) : 2 ^ h ≤ u (N + h)
declarations.docstring: Positivity upgrades exact doubling to the natural-number lower bound `2^h ≤ u(N+h)`.

declarations.name: pow_le_mul_binaryCoeffTail_of_support_fraction_zeroWindow
declarations.signature: theorem pow_le_mul_binaryCoeffTail_of_support_fraction_zeroWindow (A : Set ℕ) (hA : ∃ a : ℕ, 0 < a ∧ a ∈ A) (p : ℤ) (c v N h : ℕ) (hv : 0 < v) (hvalue : erdosSupportSeries 2 A = (p : ℝ) / ((2 ^ c * v : ℕ) : ℝ)) (hzero : SupportCoeffZeroWindow A (c + N) h) : (2 : ℝ) ^ h ≤ (v : ℝ) * binaryCoeffTail (supportCoeff A) (c + N + h)
declarations.docstring: Fraction-facing algebraic boundary. For a displayed denominator `2^c * v`, every zero window forces the odd tail state, hence the scaled true tail, to be at least `2^h`.

declarations.name: SupportCoeffTailEnvelope
declarations.signature: def SupportCoeffTailEnvelope (A : Set ℕ) (envelope : ℕ → ℝ) : Prop
declarations.docstring: An explicit upper envelope for the scaled support-coefficient tail.

declarations.name: summable_succ_div_two_pow
declarations.signature: theorem summable_succ_div_two_pow : Summable (fun j : ℕ => ((j + 1 : ℕ) : ℝ) / (2 : ℝ) ^ (j + 1))
declarations.docstring: The weighted geometric majorant used by every subpower tail envelope is summable.

declarations.name: tsum_succ_div_two_pow
declarations.signature: theorem tsum_succ_div_two_pow : (∑' j : ℕ, ((j + 1 : ℕ) : ℝ) / (2 : ℝ) ^ (j + 1)) = 2
declarations.docstring: Exact value of the weighted geometric majorant.

declarations.name: binaryCoeffTail_le_two_mul_rpow
declarations.signature: theorem binaryCoeffTail_le_two_mul_rpow (f : ℕ → ℕ) (C δ : ℝ) (hδ0 : 0 ≤ δ) (hδ1 : δ ≤ 1) (hf : ∀ n : ℕ, (f n : ℝ) ≤ C * (n : ℝ) ^ δ) (M : ℕ) : binaryCoeffTail f M ≤ 2 * C * (((M + 1 : ℕ) : ℝ) ^ δ)
declarations.docstring: A coefficient bound `f(n) ≤ C n^δ`, with `0 ≤ δ ≤ 1`, gives the explicit binary-tail bound `2 C (M+1)^δ`. The proof also derives `C ≥ 0` from the bound at `n = 1`, so callers do not need a redundant sign hypothesis.

declarations.name: supportCoeffTailEnvelope_two_mul_rpow_of_card_divisors_bound
declarations.signature: theorem supportCoeffTailEnvelope_two_mul_rpow_of_card_divisors_bound (A : Set ℕ) (C δ : ℝ) (hδ0 : 0 ≤ δ) (hδ1 : δ ≤ 1) (hdiv : ∀ n : ℕ, (n.divisors.card : ℝ) ≤ C * (n : ℝ) ^ δ) : SupportCoeffTailEnvelope A (fun M : ℕ => 2 * C * (((M + 1 : ℕ) : ℝ) ^ δ))
declarations.docstring: Package a pointwise divisor-card bound into the exact tail-envelope interface consumed by the rational carry theorem below.

declarations.name: supportCoeffTailEnvelope_divisorSubpower
declarations.signature: theorem supportCoeffTailEnvelope_divisorSubpower (A : Set ℕ) (k : ℕ) (hk : 1 ≤ k) : SupportCoeffTailEnvelope A (fun M : ℕ => 2 * (divisorSubpowerConst k : ℝ) * (((M + 1 : ℕ) : ℝ) ^ ((k : ℝ)⁻¹)))
declarations.docstring: Unconditional support-tail envelope with exponent exactly `1/k`.

declarations.name: pow_le_mul_tailEnvelope_of_support_fraction_zeroWindow
declarations.signature: theorem pow_le_mul_tailEnvelope_of_support_fraction_zeroWindow (A : Set ℕ) (hA : ∃ a : ℕ, 0 < a ∧ a ∈ A) (p : ℤ) (c v N h : ℕ) (hv : 0 < v) (hvalue : erdosSupportSeries 2 A = (p : ℝ) / ((2 ^ c * v : ℕ) : ℝ)) (hzero : SupportCoeffZeroWindow A (c + N) h) (envelope : ℕ → ℝ) (henvelope : SupportCoeffTailEnvelope A envelope) : (2 : ℝ) ^ h ≤ (v : ℝ) * envelope (c + N + h)
declarations.docstring: Once a subpower tail envelope is supplied, a zero window is bounded by that envelope at its right endpoint. No divisor-growth implementation detail leaks into the rational-support argument.

declarations.name: pow_le_mul_two_mul_rpow_of_card_divisors_bound_zeroWindow
declarations.signature: theorem pow_le_mul_two_mul_rpow_of_card_divisors_bound_zeroWindow (A : Set ℕ) (hA : ∃ a : ℕ, 0 < a ∧ a ∈ A) (p : ℤ) (c v N h : ℕ) (hv : 0 < v) (hvalue : erdosSupportSeries 2 A = (p : ℝ) / ((2 ^ c * v : ℕ) : ℝ)) (hzero : SupportCoeffZeroWindow A (c + N) h) (C δ : ℝ) (hδ0 : 0 ≤ δ) (hδ1 : δ ≤ 1) (hdiv : ∀ n : ℕ, (n.divisors.card : ℝ) ≤ C * (n : ℝ) ^ δ) : (2 : ℝ) ^ h ≤ (v : ℝ) * (2 * C * ((((c + N + h) + 1 : ℕ) : ℝ) ^ δ))
declarations.docstring: Direct consumer bridge from any pointwise divisor subpower bound to a zero-window power inequality.

declarations.name: pow_le_divisorSubpower_of_support_fraction_zeroWindow
declarations.signature: theorem pow_le_divisorSubpower_of_support_fraction_zeroWindow (A : Set ℕ) (hA : ∃ a : ℕ, 0 < a ∧ a ∈ A) (p : ℤ) (c v N h k : ℕ) (hv : 0 < v) (hk : 1 ≤ k) (hvalue : erdosSupportSeries 2 A = (p : ℝ) / ((2 ^ c * v : ℕ) : ℝ)) (hzero : SupportCoeffZeroWindow A (c + N) h) : (2 : ℝ) ^ h ≤ (2 * (v : ℝ) * (divisorSubpowerConst k : ℝ)) * (((c + N + 1 + h : ℕ) : ℝ) ^ ((k : ℝ)⁻¹))
declarations.docstring: The unconditional divisor-subpower envelope composed with the verified rational carry mechanism.

declarations.name: pow_sub_one_mul_le_of_pow_le_mul_add_invNat_rpow
declarations.signature: theorem pow_sub_one_mul_le_of_pow_le_mul_add_invNat_rpow (k Y h : ℕ) (hk : 2 ≤ k) (hY : 1 ≤ Y) (L : ℝ) (hL : 1 ≤ L) (hpow : (2 : ℝ) ^ h ≤ L * (((Y + h : ℕ) : ℝ) ^ ((k : ℝ)⁻¹))) : (2 : ℝ) ^ ((k - 1) * h) ≤ L ^ k * (Y : ℝ)
declarations.docstring: Raising the self-referential inequality to the `k`-th power and using `Y+h ≤ Y*2^h` consumes exactly one of the `k` binary factors.

declarations.name: length_le_logb_of_pow_le_mul_add_invNat_rpow
declarations.signature: theorem length_le_logb_of_pow_le_mul_add_invNat_rpow (k Y h : ℕ) (hk : 2 ≤ k) (hY : 1 ≤ Y) (L : ℝ) (hL : 1 ≤ L) (hpow : (2 : ℝ) ^ h ≤ L * (((Y + h : ℕ) : ℝ) ^ ((k : ℝ)⁻¹))) : (h : ℝ) ≤ (Real.logb 2 (Y : ℝ) + Real.logb 2 (L ^ k)) / ((k - 1 : ℕ) : ℝ)
declarations.docstring: Logarithmic form of the absorption theorem. The final coefficient is `1/(k-1)`, although the divisor and tail exponent is `1/k`.

declarations.name: exists_nat_two_le_inv_sub_one_le
declarations.signature: theorem exists_nat_two_le_inv_sub_one_le {ε : ℝ} (hε : 0 < ε) : ∃ k : ℕ, 2 ≤ k ∧ (((k - 1 : ℕ) : ℝ))⁻¹ ≤ ε
declarations.docstring: Archimedean selector in exactly the exponent produced by absorption.

declarations.name: logb_nat_affine_le_add
declarations.signature: theorem logb_nat_affine_le_add (c N : ℕ) : Real.logb 2 (c + N + 1 : ℝ) ≤ Real.logb 2 (c + 1 : ℝ) + Real.logb 2 (N + 1 : ℝ)
declarations.docstring: Separate the fixed affine shift from the growing index inside `log₂`.

declarations.name: le_epsilon_mul_logb_add_constant_div_of_affine_log_bound
declarations.signature: theorem le_epsilon_mul_logb_add_constant_div_of_affine_log_bound {ε D x : ℝ} {c N k : ℕ} (hbound : x ≤ (Real.logb 2 (c + N + 1 : ℝ) + D) / ((k - 1 : ℕ) : ℝ)) (hinv : (((k - 1 : ℕ) : ℝ))⁻¹ ≤ ε) : x ≤ ε * Real.logb 2 (N + 1 : ℝ) + (Real.logb 2 (c + 1 : ℝ) + D) / ((k - 1 : ℕ) : ℝ)
declarations.docstring: Convert a parameterized `1/(k-1)` affine-log estimate to an `ε * log₂(N+1)` estimate while keeping the remaining term explicit.

declarations.name: supportCoeffZeroWindow_length_le_logb_divisorSubpower
declarations.signature: theorem supportCoeffZeroWindow_length_le_logb_divisorSubpower (A : Set ℕ) (hA : ∃ a : ℕ, 0 < a ∧ a ∈ A) (p : ℤ) (c v N h k : ℕ) (hv : 0 < v) (hk : 2 ≤ k) (hvalue : erdosSupportSeries 2 A = (p : ℝ) / ((2 ^ c * v : ℕ) : ℝ)) (hzero : SupportCoeffZeroWindow A (c + N) h) : (h : ℝ) ≤ (Real.logb 2 (c + N + 1 : ℝ) + Real.logb 2 ((2 * (v : ℝ) * (divisorSubpowerConst k : ℝ)) ^ k)) / ((k - 1 : ℕ) : ℝ)
declarations.docstring: Parameterized fixed-`k` theorem. This is the load-bearing form from which the every-`ε` statement follows.

declarations.name: supportCoeffZeroWindow_length_le_eps_logb_add
declarations.signature: theorem supportCoeffZeroWindow_length_le_eps_logb_add (A : Set ℕ) (hA : ∃ a : ℕ, 0 < a ∧ a ∈ A) (p : ℤ) (c v : ℕ) (hv : 0 < v) (hvalue : erdosSupportSeries 2 A = (p : ℝ) / ((2 ^ c * v : ℕ) : ℝ)) (ε : ℝ) (hε : 0 < ε) : ∃ B : ℝ, 0 ≤ B ∧ ∀ N h : ℕ, SupportCoeffZeroWindow A (c + N) h → (h : ℝ) ≤ ε * Real.logb 2 (N + 1 : ℝ) + B
declarations.docstring: For every positive `ε`, a rational support-series value forces every support-coefficient zero window to have length at most `ε * log₂(N+1)` plus a constant depending only on `ε`, `v`, and `c`. The bound is uniform in the support `A`, numerator `p`, starting index `N`, and window length `h`.

declarations.name: logb_nat_succ_le_one_add
declarations.signature: theorem logb_nat_succ_le_one_add (N : ℕ) (hN : 1 ≤ N) : Real.logb 2 (N + 1 : ℝ) ≤ 1 + Real.logb 2 (N : ℝ)
declarations.docstring: For positive `N`, replace the total `log₂(N+1)` form by the customary paper-facing `log₂ N` form at the cost of one additive `ε`.

declarations.name: supportCoeffZeroWindow_length_le_eps_logb
declarations.signature: theorem supportCoeffZeroWindow_length_le_eps_logb (A : Set ℕ) (hA : ∃ a : ℕ, 0 < a ∧ a ∈ A) (p : ℤ) (c v : ℕ) (hv : 0 < v) (hvalue : erdosSupportSeries 2 A = (p : ℝ) / ((2 ^ c * v : ℕ) : ℝ)) (ε : ℝ) (hε : 0 < ε) : ∃ B : ℝ, 0 ≤ B ∧ ∀ N h : ℕ, 1 ≤ N → SupportCoeffZeroWindow A (c + N) h → (h : ℝ) ≤ ε * Real.logb 2 (N : ℝ) + B
declarations.docstring: Exact `ε * log₂ N + O(1)` form for every positive starting index.

declarations.name: totientTail
declarations.docstring: The local totient tail `R_N = ∑_{j≥0} φ(N+1+j)/2^{j+1} = ∑_{m≥1} φ(N+m)/2^m`: the fractional layer of `2^N · S`.

declarations.name: totientPrefix
declarations.docstring: The integer prefix `Φ_N = ∑_{n=0}^{N} φ(n)·2^{N-n}` of `2^N · S`.

declarations.name: windowDiscrepancy
declarations.signature: def windowDiscrepancy (h N L : ℕ) : ℤ
declarations.docstring: The window discrepancy `A_{h,N,L} = ∑_{j=0}^{L-1} (φ(N+h+1+j) - φ(N+1+j))·2^{L-1-j}`: the depth-`L` truncation of `2^L·(R_{N+h} - R_N)`.

declarations.name: certifiedKill
declarations.signature: def certifiedKill (h N L : ℕ) : Prop
declarations.docstring: The decidable period-killer certificate: the residue of `A_{h,N,L}` modulo `2^L` avoids the radius-`(N+h+L+2)` neighbourhood of `0`.

declarations.name: div_two_pow_eq
declarations.signature: private lemma div_two_pow_eq (a : ℝ) (n : ℕ) : a / 2 ^ n = a * (1 / 2 : ℝ) ^ n
declarations.docstring: The decidable period-killer certificate: the residue of `A_{h,N,L}` modulo `2^L` avoids the radius-`(N+h+L+2)` neighbourhood of `0`. -/ def certifiedKill (h N L : ℕ) : Prop := (N + h + L + 2 : ℤ) < windowDiscrepancy h N L % 2 ^ L ∧ windowDiscrepancy h N L % 2 ^ L < 2 ^ L - (N + h + L + 2) instance (h N L : ℕ) : Decidable (certifiedKill h N L) := inferInstanceAs (Decidable (_ ∧ _)) /-! ## Geometric-linear summability spine

declarations.name: summable_linear_half
declarations.signature: private lemma summable_linear_half : Summable (fun j : ℕ => (j : ℝ) * (1 / 2 : ℝ) ^ j)

declarations.name: summable_const_add_mul_half
declarations.signature: private lemma summable_const_add_mul_half (C : ℝ) : Summable (fun j : ℕ => (C + (j : ℝ)) * (1 / 2 : ℝ) ^ j)

declarations.name: tsum_const_add_mul_half
declarations.signature: private lemma tsum_const_add_mul_half (C : ℝ) : ∑' j : ℕ, (C + (j : ℝ)) * (1 / 2 : ℝ) ^ j = 2 * C + 2

declarations.name: summable_totientTail_terms
declarations.signature: lemma summable_totientTail_terms (M : ℕ) : Summable (fun j : ℕ => (Nat.totient (M + 1 + j) : ℝ) / 2 ^ (j + 1))
declarations.docstring: The tail terms of `totientTail` are summable.

declarations.name: summable_totient_div_two_pow
declarations.signature: lemma summable_totient_div_two_pow : Summable (fun n : ℕ => (Nat.totient n : ℝ) / 2 ^ n)
declarations.docstring: The full totient series is summable.

declarations.name: two_pow_mul_totient_series_eq
declarations.signature: theorem two_pow_mul_totient_series_eq (N : ℕ) : (2 : ℝ) ^ N * (∑' n : ℕ, (Nat.totient n : ℝ) / 2 ^ n) = (totientPrefix N : ℝ) + totientTail N
declarations.docstring: **Shift identity.** `2^N` times the #249 constant splits as integer prefix plus the local totient tail. This is what makes the binary expansion of `S` a statement about `R_N`.

declarations.name: totientTail_eq_partial_add_tail
declarations.signature: lemma totientTail_eq_partial_add_tail (M L : ℕ) : totientTail M = (∑ j ∈ Finset.range L, (Nat.totient (M + 1 + j) : ℝ) / 2 ^ (j + 1)) + ∑' j : ℕ, (Nat.totient (M + 1 + (j + L)) : ℝ) / 2 ^ ((j + L) + 1)
declarations.docstring: Exact decomposition of the tail at window depth `L`.

declarations.name: tail_after_nonneg
declarations.signature: lemma tail_after_nonneg (M L : ℕ) : 0 ≤ ∑' j : ℕ, (Nat.totient (M + 1 + (j + L)) : ℝ) / 2 ^ ((j + L) + 1)
declarations.docstring: The deep tail is nonnegative.

declarations.name: tail_after_le
declarations.signature: lemma tail_after_le (M L : ℕ) : ∑' j : ℕ, (Nat.totient (M + 1 + (j + L)) : ℝ) / 2 ^ ((j + L) + 1) ≤ ((M : ℝ) + L + 2) / 2 ^ L
declarations.docstring: The deep tail after `L` window terms is at most `(M+L+2)/2^L` — the only analytic input is `φ(n) ≤ n` against a geometric-linear majorant.

declarations.name: windowDiscrepancy_div_eq
declarations.signature: lemma windowDiscrepancy_div_eq (h N L : ℕ) : ((windowDiscrepancy h N L : ℤ) : ℝ) / 2 ^ L = (∑ j ∈ Finset.range L, (Nat.totient (N + h + 1 + j) : ℝ) / 2 ^ (j + 1)) - ∑ j ∈ Finset.range L, (Nat.totient (N + 1 + j) : ℝ) / 2 ^ (j + 1)
declarations.docstring: The window discrepancy over `2^L` is the difference of the two partial windows.

declarations.name: tail_diff_notMem_int_of_certifiedKill
declarations.signature: theorem tail_diff_notMem_int_of_certifiedKill {h N L : ℕ} (hcert : certifiedKill h N L) : totientTail (N + h) - totientTail N ∉ Set.range ((↑) : ℤ → ℝ)
declarations.docstring: **Certificate soundness.** If the residue of `A_{h,N,L}` modulo `2^L` avoids the radius-`(N+h+L+2)` neighbourhood of `0`, then `R_{N+h} - R_N` is not an integer: period `h` is dead at position `N`.

declarations.name: tail_diff_int_of_den_dvd
declarations.signature: theorem tail_diff_int_of_den_dvd (r : ℚ) (hS : (∑' n : ℕ, (Nat.totient n : ℝ) / 2 ^ n) = (r : ℝ)) (h N : ℕ) (hdvd : (r.den : ℕ) ∣ 2 ^ N * (2 ^ h - 1)) : totientTail (N + h) - totientTail N ∈ Set.range ((↑) : ℤ → ℝ)
declarations.docstring: If `S = r ∈ ℚ` and `r.den ∣ 2^N·(2^h - 1)`, the `(h, N)` tail difference is an integer. This is the sharp form: any `h` whose Mersenne number kills the odd part of the denominator works, with pre-period exactly `v₂(den)`.

declarations.name: eventual_period_of_not_irrational
declarations.signature: theorem eventual_period_of_not_irrational (hrat : ¬ Irrational (∑' n : ℕ, (Nat.totient n : ℝ) / 2 ^ n)) : ∃ h : ℕ, 0 < h ∧ ∃ N₀ : ℕ, ∀ N, N₀ ≤ N → totientTail (N + h) - totientTail N ∈ Set.range ((↑) : ℤ → ℝ)
declarations.docstring: **Tail-period law.** If the totient series is rational, some period `h ≥ 1` makes every shifted tail difference an integer from the pre-period `v₂(den)` on.

declarations.name: irrational_totient_series_of_certificate_supply
declarations.signature: theorem irrational_totient_series_of_certificate_supply (hsupply : ∀ h : ℕ, 0 < h → ∀ N₀ : ℕ, ∃ N, N₀ ≤ N ∧ ∃ L, certifiedKill h N L) : Irrational (∑' n : ℕ, (Nat.totient n : ℝ) / 2 ^ n)
declarations.docstring: **The wave-21 reduction (the throat of #249).** A certified period-kill supply — for every period `h ≥ 1` and every threshold `N₀`, a certified kill at some `(N ≥ N₀, L)` — proves the totient series irrational. Each individual certificate is a finite, decidable residue computation.

declarations.name: certifiedKill_all_small
declarations.signature: theorem certifiedKill_all_small : ∀ h ∈ Finset.Icc 1 8, certifiedKill h 12 16
declarations.docstring: Machine-checked kills: for every period `h ∈ [1,8]` the residue certificate holds at `(N, L) = (12, 16)`. Kernel-decidable: 256 totient values below 37.

declarations.name: tail_diff_not_int_small
declarations.signature: theorem tail_diff_not_int_small (h : ℕ) (h1 : 1 ≤ h) (h8 : h ≤ 8) : totientTail (12 + h) - totientTail 12 ∉ Set.range ((↑) : ℤ → ℝ)
declarations.docstring: No shifted tail difference with period `h ≤ 8` is an integer at `N = 12`.

declarations.name: totient_series_ne_rat_of_den_dvd
declarations.signature: theorem totient_series_ne_rat_of_den_dvd (r : ℚ) (h : ℕ) (h1 : 1 ≤ h) (h8 : h ≤ 8) (hdvd : (r.den : ℕ) ∣ 2 ^ 12 * (2 ^ h - 1)) : (∑' n : ℕ, (Nat.totient n : ℝ) / 2 ^ n) ≠ (r : ℝ)
declarations.docstring: **Concrete denominator exclusion.** The totient series equals no rational whose denominator divides `2¹²·(2ʰ-1)` for some `1 ≤ h ≤ 8`: no dyadic rational with denominator up to `2¹²`, and no `k/(2ᵃ·m)` with `a ≤ 12` and the multiplicative order of `2` mod `m` at most `8`.
